name: Application Infrastructure
description: Web servers, application servers, message queues, CDNs, and DNS — HTTP errors, response times, and SSL certificates.
quickTip: Forward web server access/error logs and install the appropriate TA for structured field extraction.

subcategories.name: Web Servers & Reverse Proxies
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Apache Web Server (`Splunk_TA_apache`), Splunk Add-on for NGINX (`TA-nginx`), Windows TA for IIS logs, Traefik syslog.

subcategories.name: Application Servers & Runtimes
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for JMX (`TA-jmx`), OpenTelemetry Collector (`Splunk_TA_otel`), custom log inputs for application frameworks.

subcategories.name: Message Queues & Event Streaming
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Connect for Kafka (Splunkbase 3862), JMX, RabbitMQ management API (scripted input), custom REST inputs.

subcategories.name: API Gateways & Service Mesh
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Custom access log inputs, Envoy access log parsing, Istio telemetry, Kong/Apigee API inputs.

subcategories.name: Caching Layers
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Custom scripted inputs (Redis CLI, Memcached stats), Varnish syslog, SNMP for hardware caches.
